title: potentilla canescens subvar. oligotricha
intro: Potentilla canescens subvar. oligotricha is a variant of the Potentilla canescens plant, a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Potentilla canescens subvar. oligotricha include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues.
